zh.lifeSummary: 當Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr於1697年1月16日出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾古布雷次霍分時，他的父親Wendel Leibenguth21歲，母親Anna Margaretha Schaffers15歲。他於1720年與Anna Margretha Sands在美國阿拉巴馬州結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1750年住在美國賓夕法尼亞州費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞。他去世於1754年5月20日在美國賓夕法尼亞州貝可斯可爾布盧達爾 堂史普享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr于1697年1月16日出生在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾古布雷次霍分时，他的父亲Wendel Leibenguth21岁，母亲Anna Margaretha Schaffers15岁。他于1720年与Anna Margretha Sands在美国亚拉巴马州结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1750年住在美国宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞。他去世于1754年5月20日在美国宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯可爾布盧達爾 堂史普享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jacob
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from Hebrew Yaakov. This was borne by perhaps the most important of all the patriarchs in the Book of Genesis. Jacob was the father of twelve sons, who gave their names to the twelve tribes of Israel. He was the son of Isaac and Rebecca and twin brother of Esau. According to the story in Genesis, he was the cunning younger twin, who persuaded his brother Esau to part with his right to his inheritance in exchange for a bowl of soup (‘a mess of pottage’). Later, he tricked his blind and dying father into blessing him in place of Esau. The derivation of the name has been much discussed. It is traditionally explained as being derived from Hebrew akev ‘heel’ and to have meant ‘heel grabber’, because when Jacob was born ‘his hand took hold of Esau's heel’ (Genesis 25:26). This is interpreted later in the Bible as ‘supplanter’ Esau himself remarks, ‘Is he not rightly named Jacob? for he has supplanted me these two times’ (Genesis 27:36). Jacob is especially common as a Jewish given name, although it also became very popular among the Puritans from the 16th century onwards, and has again been widely used since the 1990s. Compare James .

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.
Historical Boundaries 1752: Berks, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Berks, Pennsylvania, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr was born on 16 January 1697, in Gumbrechtshoffen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, his father, Wendel Leibenguth, was 21 and his mother, Anna Margaretha Schaffers, was 15. He married Anna Margretha Sands in 1720, in Alabama, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He lived in Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States in 1750. He died on 20 May 1754, in Colebrookdale Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr est né le 16 janvier 1697, à Gumbrechtshoffen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Wendel Leibenguth, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Anna Margaretha Schaffers, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Anna Margretha Sands en 1720, à Alabama, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il a vécu à Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis en 1750. Il est décédé le 20 mai 1754, à Colebrookdale Township, Berks, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr am 16. Januar 1697 in Gumbrechtshofen-Niederbronn, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wendel Leibenguth 21 und seine Mutter Anna Margaretha Schaffers 15. Er hat 1720 in Alabama, Vereinigte Staaten Anna Margretha Sands geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. 1750 hat er in Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 20. Mai 1754 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Colebrookdale Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten.

ja.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jrが1697年1月16日にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒングンブレチトショフンで生まれた時，父Wendel Leibenguthは21歳，母Anna Margaretha Schaffersは15歳であった。1720年にアメリカ合衆国アラバマ州でAnna Margretha Sandsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1750年にはアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアフィラデルフィアに住んでいた。彼は1754年5月20日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州バークスコーレブルークダル トウンシュイップで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr(이)가 1697년 1월 16일 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 거브레ch츠호펜에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wendel Leibenguth(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Margaretha Schaffers(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1720년 미국 앨라배마 주에서 Anna Margretha Sands(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1750년도에 미국 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 필라들필아에서 살았다. 그는 1754년 5월 20일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 버크스 콜레브룩데일 타운시프에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr nasceu em 16 de janeiro de 1697, em Gumbrechtshoffen, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, seu pai, Wendel Leibenguth, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Anna Margaretha Schaffers, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Margretha Sands em 1720, em Alabama, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América em 1750. Ele faleceu em 20 de maio de 1754, em Colebrookdale Township, Berks, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr родился 16 января 1697 г. в местности гумбречцхоффен, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Wendel Leibenguth было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Anna Margaretha Schaffers, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Margretha Sands в 1720 г. в местности Алабама, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он жил в местности филаделфя, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в 1750 году. Он умер 20 мая 1754 г. в местности колебрукдеил тоуншип, биркс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 57 лет.
